data.name: label1.Text
data.value:
Evidence was everywhere. Crumbs on the table. Crumbs on the floor. Suspicious chocolate marks… on Pusheen’s face.
But Pusheen stayed confident. She sniffed the plate. Inspected the chair. Even looked under the table — perhaps a mysterious thief was hiding there. “Maybe it was a dog,” she thought. Even though there had never been a dog in the apartment. And the door was closed.
